tif.tagspecs

Class GpsDataManager

  • java.lang.Object
    • tif.tagspecs.GpsDataManager

  • public final class GpsDataManager
extends java.lang.Object
    Utility class that converts GPS metadata into ExifTool-style human-readable representations.

    This class formats GPS coordinates, altitude, timestamps, bearings, and other GPS-specific metadata into descriptive text suitable for display.

    Since:
    27 June 2026
    Version:
    1.3
    Author:
    Trevor Maggs

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor Description
      private GpsDataManager()  

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      private static java.lang.String formatAltitude(java.lang.Object val)
      Formats an altitude value in metres.
      private static java.lang.String formatBearing(java.lang.Object val)
      Formats a bearing or direction value.
      private static java.lang.String formatCoordinate(java.lang.Object val)
      Formats a GPS coordinate stored as degrees, minutes, and seconds.
      private static java.lang.String formatDateStamp(java.lang.Object val)
      Formats a GPS date stamp using the default locale.
      private static java.lang.String formatTimeStamp(java.lang.Object val)
      Formats a GPS timestamp into HH:mm:ss.
      static java.lang.String getDisplayValue(java.lang.Object val, TagIFD_GPS tag)
      Converts raw positional GPS tag attributes into normalised descriptive display text.
      private static java.lang.String translateAltitudeRef(java.lang.Object val)
      Translates a GPS altitude reference.
      private static java.lang.String translateDestDistanceRef(java.lang.Object val)
      Translates a GPS destination distance reference.
      private static java.lang.String translateDifferential(java.lang.Object val)
      Translates a GPS differential correction status.
      private static java.lang.String translateDirectionRef(java.lang.Object val)
      Translates a GPS direction reference.
      private static java.lang.String translateLatitudeRef(java.lang.Object val)
      Translates a GPS latitude reference.
      private static java.lang.String translateLongitudeRef(java.lang.Object val)
      Translates a GPS longitude reference.
      private static java.lang.String translateMeasureMode(java.lang.Object val)
      Translates a GPS measurement mode.
      private static java.lang.String translateSpeedRef(java.lang.Object val)
      Translates a GPS speed reference.
      private static java.lang.String translateStatus(java.lang.Object val)
      Translates a GPS receiver status value.

    • Constructor Detail

      • GpsDataManager

        private GpsDataManager()

    • Method Detail

      • getDisplayValue

        public static java.lang.String getDisplayValue(java.lang.Object val,
                                               TagIFD_GPS tag)
        Converts raw positional GPS tag attributes into normalised descriptive display text.
        Parameters:
        val - the raw GPS tag value
        tag - the GPS tag definition
        Returns:
        a localised formatted descriptive text representation, or an empty string

      • translateLatitudeRef

        private static java.lang.String translateLatitudeRef(java.lang.Object val)
        Translates a GPS latitude reference.
        Parameters:
        val - the raw tag value
        Returns:
        the hemisphere name

      • formatCoordinate

        private static java.lang.String formatCoordinate(java.lang.Object val)
        Formats a GPS coordinate stored as degrees, minutes, and seconds.
        Parameters:
        val - the raw tag value
        Returns:
        the formatted coordinate expressed as degrees, minutes, and seconds, or an empty string if unavailable

      • translateLongitudeRef

        private static java.lang.String translateLongitudeRef(java.lang.Object val)
        Translates a GPS longitude reference.
        Parameters:
        val - the raw tag value
        Returns:
        the hemisphere name

      • translateAltitudeRef

        private static java.lang.String translateAltitudeRef(java.lang.Object val)
        Translates a GPS altitude reference.
        Parameters:
        val - the raw tag value
        Returns:
        the altitude reference description

      • formatAltitude

        private static java.lang.String formatAltitude(java.lang.Object val)
        Formats an altitude value in metres.
        Parameters:
        val - the raw tag value
        Returns:
        the formatted altitude in metres

      • formatTimeStamp

        private static java.lang.String formatTimeStamp(java.lang.Object val)
        Formats a GPS timestamp into HH:mm:ss.
        Parameters:
        val - the raw tag value
        Returns:
        the formatted time, or an empty string if unavailable

      • translateStatus

        private static java.lang.String translateStatus(java.lang.Object val)
        Translates a GPS receiver status value.
        Parameters:
        val - the raw tag value
        Returns:
        the receiver status description

      • translateMeasureMode

        private static java.lang.String translateMeasureMode(java.lang.Object val)
        Translates a GPS measurement mode.
        Parameters:
        val - the raw tag value
        Returns:
        the measurement mode description

      • translateSpeedRef

        private static java.lang.String translateSpeedRef(java.lang.Object val)
        Translates a GPS speed reference.
        Parameters:
        val - the raw tag value
        Returns:
        the speed unit

      • translateDirectionRef

        private static java.lang.String translateDirectionRef(java.lang.Object val)
        Translates a GPS direction reference.
        Parameters:
        val - the raw tag value
        Returns:
        the direction reference description

      • formatBearing

        private static java.lang.String formatBearing(java.lang.Object val)
        Formats a bearing or direction value.
        Parameters:
        val - the raw tag value
        Returns:
        the formatted bearing, or an empty string if no valid bearing is available

      • translateDestDistanceRef

        private static java.lang.String translateDestDistanceRef(java.lang.Object val)
        Translates a GPS destination distance reference.
        Parameters:
        val - the raw tag value
        Returns:
        the destination distance unit

      • formatDateStamp

        private static java.lang.String formatDateStamp(java.lang.Object val)
        Formats a GPS date stamp using the default locale.
        Parameters:
        val - the raw tag value
        Returns:
        the formatted localised date, the original value if it cannot be parsed, or an empty string if unavailable

      • translateDifferential

        private static java.lang.String translateDifferential(java.lang.Object val)
        Translates a GPS differential correction status.
        Parameters:
        val - the raw tag value
        Returns:
        the differential correction description
